input_dict.question: What is the nationality of UFOlogist who is credited with being among the first to claim contact with Nordic aliens in the mid 1950s?
input_dict.source_summary: George Adamski was Polish-American (a Polish American citizen), as corroborated by passage [1].
input_dict.target_summary: Bridge entity: George Adamski. Summary_1 reports that Adamski is credited with being among the first to claim contact with Nordic aliens in the mid-1950s. The retrieved George Adamski page (hop2) explicitly states: "George Adamski (17 April 1891 – 23 April 1965) was a Polish American citizen" and also says he "...met with friendly Nordic alien Space Brothers...", thereby providing the supporting evidence for his nationality (Polish American) alongside the contact claim.
